data.body: B6 PASS+signed+claimed claude-b6. Reference map (from the review's T8 advisories): templates.py:SCAFFOLD_V1 → rebar workflow new via _cli/_workflow_commands.py + re-exported __init__.py:67; code_review.yaml consumed by test_bpmn.py:398, test_workflow_schema_golden.py:78, test_code_review_example.py:24; templates.scaffold by test_cli.py. Plan: inline a minimal scaffold into the CLI (keep rebar workflow new working), delete templates.py + code_review.yaml, keep review_skeleton.yaml, update/remove bound tests, grep-clean. NOTE: B6 based on the hotfix branch (fix/gate-engine-default-bespoke) since it must merge after #42.
